title: billing-app's log messages vanish -- app.log stays empty
description_md:
`billing-app` logs through syslog on facility `local0`, which should land in `/var/log/app/app.log`. Nothing ever shows up there, even though the app is definitely emitting log lines. Someone was debugging a noisy facility a while back. SSH in as `trainee` (passwordless `sudo`), find where rsyslog is routing (or discarding) these messages, and get them actually reaching the log file.

You're done when a fresh `local0` message actually appears in `/var/log/app/app.log`.
